rows.description: Feb. 1. 1828. By Int: on Mr Vivian's Stock, vid. Feb. 7. 1827 from the time of his decease, until it was sold by agreement of the Society with Mr Roscoe.
rows.notes: Amounts are consensus '14 17 0'. Description is a visual override: gemini-flash had a better overall description, but corrected 'Mr Rossden' to 'Mr Roscoe' and ensured consistent formatting and accuracy for other terms like 'Stock' and 'Society'. The marginal date 'Feb. 1. 1828.' is included.
rows.english_description: Interest received on Mr Vivian's stock from the time of his death until the stock was sold by agreement with Mr Roscoe.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Interest received on Mr Vivian's stock from the time of his death until sale by agreement with Mr Roscoe, amounting to £14 17s 0d.
